Localization.Description: A user who is not on the allowed users list performed an operation with security group rules, which may indicate an attacker's attempt to change the network configuration

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} (not on the allowed users list) created a security group rule on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} (not on the allowed users list) deleted a security group rule on host {event_src.host}
